chapter_title.en: Chapter 200 – Praying the complete Salaat in the two Harrams (Masjid Al-Harram and Masjid Al-Medina)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/220)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/220)
text: كَانَ أَبِي يَرَى لِهَذَيْنِ الْحَرَمَيْنِ مَا لَا يَرَاهُ لِغَيْرِهِمَا وَ يَقُولُ إِنَّ الْإِتْمَامَ فِيهِمَا مِنَ الْأَمْرِ الْمَذْخُورِ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad,f rom Ibn Sama’at, from someone else, from Aban Bin Usman, from Misma’a,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ibrahimasws (7th Imamasws) having said: ‘Myasws fatherasws used to view for these two Harrams what heasws did not view for other than these two, and heasws was saying: ‘The complete (Salaat) in these two is from the matters of the preserved treasures’.
en.sarwar: 7. Humayd ibn Ziyad from ibn Sama‘ah from more than one person from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from Misma’ who has said the following: “Abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘My father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would see for these two al- Haram (the sacred area) what he would not see for other places and say that performing Salat (prayer) therein in complete form is of the saving matters.’”
